Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: You are always going to be someone's worm, unless you get lucky in life and inherit a whole lot of your ancestor's money.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: You can either kick back and relax from the moment of your germination, or you can get into investing and pretend that it's the same thing as any real work.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: But because you're so uneducated -- or you hold a worthless degree thanks to your connections -- when you attempt to do anything more than throw money at the rest of us, we have to start playing games around you--

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: --just so you don't kill any momentum that us real professionals had! Insecure twigs!

Line.Text: If only I was so lucky. If only...

Choices.Text: Do you think that you'd do better if you grew up in wealth?
Sounds to me like you're just not working hard enough.
